title: aprs_is.rs: add f64 edge case tests for precision fix
description: Following independent review of project-LICHEN-rl9v APRS precision fix: add explicit tests for f64 NaN/Inf/very-large/exact-0.5 rounding, southern/boundary lat-lon values in aprs_to_cot. Verify no panic on cast in CompactCot. Triple-impl N/A for gateway.
close_reason: Added comprehensive f64 edge case tests for NaN/Inf/large/0.5-rounding/southern/boundary values in aprs_to_cot; implemented .round().clamp() to fix precision truncation and prevent cast panics in CompactCot conversions; all tests pass, cargo fmt and clippy clean; also resolves dependent rl9v
